LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS JAMES WONG AND ROBERT CAMOZZI DBA KEYNOTE PROPERTIES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO RESCISSION BECAUSE DEFENDANT IS NOT A PARTY TO THE CONTRACT AND AS TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 2079 BECAUSE THE DAUGHTER'S RECALCITRANCE WAS NOT A CONDITION OBSERVABLE ON INSPECTION. DENIED AS TO FRAUD, NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION AND NEGLIGENCE BECAUSE PLAINTIFF COULD PREVAIL ON CLAIMS THAT DEFENDANT CONCEALED MATERIAL INFORMATION CONCERNING DAUGHTER'S PAST CONDUCT. MR. RIPAMONTI IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB
